## ExtraParams.mounted() method

Emits the initial extra params, overriding with the state extra params, just in case, those values were already set by XComponents initialization (url, plugin config, etc.).

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
mounted(): void;
```
<b>Returns:</b>

void
